CustomMetadata.label: GU-009 - Guest profile has FLS read on P

values.value: Guest profile has FLS read on PII fields

The guest profile has field-level read access on fields matching PII name patterns such as BirthDate, SSN, TaxId, BankAccount, or PassportNumber. Unauthenticated users can read personally identifiable information.
PII visible to anonymous visitors creates GDPR and CCPA exposure. A single API call from a guest session can retrieve sensitive personal data at scale, constituting a data breach.
Remove FLS read on all PII fields from the guest profile. If PII must be displayed on a public Experience page, mask the data in an Apex controller method before returning it to the client.
